folio.label: 198v
folio.l: Ne neuäe wygút , shal sen he~ witú his eye
But he be chaast , and hate vylenye
¢ And thow valerian , for thow so sone

note.notetxt: 232Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Assentedest , to good counseil also
Sey what the list , & æè shalt han thy boone
I haue a brother , quod valerian tho
That in this world , I loue noman so
I preye ©ow , æ my brother may haue gce
To knowe the trouthe , as I do in this place
¢ The Aungel seide , god liketú thy requeste

note.notetxt: 239Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: And bothe witú the palme , of martirdoom
ñe shuln come , vn to his blisful placeresteplacereste241 There is an indication in the left margin next to the line which was corrected. A line with a stroke.MP
And witú that word , Tiburce his brother coom
And whan that he , the sauour vndernoom
Whicú that the Rooses , & the lilies caste
Witú Inne his herte , he gan to wondre faste
¢ And seide I wondre , this tyme of the ©ere

note.notetxt: 246Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Whennes that swote sauour , cometú so
Of Rose and lilies , that I smelle heere
For thougú I hadde hem , in myne hondes two
The sauour mygúte in me , no deppere goo
The swete smel , æ in myn herte I fynde
Hatú chaunged me , al in a nother kynde
¢ Valerian seide , two corounes han we

note.notetxt: 253Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Snow white , & Rose reed , æ shynen clere
Whicú æ thyne eyen , han no mygút to se
And as æè smellest hem , thurgú my preyere
So shaltow sen hem , leue brother deere
If it so be , æè wolt w outen slouthe
Byleeue arigút , & knowen verray trouthe
¢ Tiburce answerde , seist æè this to me

note.notetxt: 260Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: In sootúnesse , or in dreem , I herkne this
In dremes quod valerian , haue we be
Vn to this tyme , brother myn I wys
But now at erst , in trouthe , oure dwellyng is
How wostow this q¶ Tiburce , in what wyse
Quod valerian , that shal I the deuyse
¢ The Aungel of god , hatú me the trouthe I taugút

note.notetxt: 267Indication in the left margin for a paragraph mark to be included.MP

folio.l: Whicú æè shalt seen , if æ æè wolt reneye
The ydoles and be clene , and ellis naugút
And of the myracle , of theise corones tweye
Seynt Ambrose , in his päface list to seye
Solempnely , this noble doctour deere
